$ /opt/conda/bin/python /home/jovyan/LLMOnto/Benchmark/OntologyConceptMatching/maseo_code/maseo/cq2terms/cli.py --config /home/jovyan/LLMOnto/Benchmark/OntologyConceptMatching/maseo_code/maseo/cq2terms/dataset/.run_config.yaml --cqs_file /home/jovyan/LLMOnto/Benchmark/OntologyConceptMatching/maseo_code/maseo/cq2terms/dataset/cqs/swo_cq2term_cqs.json --save_file /home/jovyan/LLMOnto/Benchmark/OntologyConceptMatching/maseo_code/maseo/cq2terms/dataset/cq2terms/qwen_qwen3.6-27b/terms/swo_cq2term_cq2terms_terms.json
